All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

U

updateAdministrator(Administrator) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Updates an administrator by calling the updateAdministrator method of the AdministratorDAO implementation with the provided administrator object and returns the result.
updateAdministrator(Administrator) - Method in interface model.AdministratorDAO
Updates an administrator by calling the updateAdministrator method with the provided administrator object and returns the result.
updateAdministrator(Administrator) - Method in class model.DBImplementationAdministrator
This method updates an administrator's password in the database.
updateBooking(Book, Book) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Replaces an existing booking with a new updated booking.
updateBooking(Book, Book) - Method in interface model.BookDAO
Updates an existing booking by replacing it with a new booking structure.
updateBooking(Book, Book) - Method in class model.DBImplementationBook
Updates an old booking by deleting it and creating a new one matching the updated details.
updateClientByCode(Client) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Updates a client by calling the updateClientByCode method of the ClientDAO implementation with the provided client object and returns the result.
updateClientByCode(Client) - Method in interface model.ClientDAO
Updates a client by calling the updateClientByCode method of the ClientDAO implementation with the provided client object and returns the result.
updateClientByCode(Client) - Method in class model.DBImplementationClient
Updates an existing client's details tracking their ID.
updateCruiseByCode(Cruise) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Updates a cruise by calling the updateCruiseByCode method of the CruiseDAO implementation with the provided cruise object and returns the result.
updateCruiseByCode(Cruise) - Method in interface model.CruiseDAO
Updates a cruise by calling the updateCruiseByCode method of the CruiseDAO
updateCruiseByCode(Cruise) - Method in class model.DBImplementationCruise
This method updates the information of a cruise in the database based on the provided Cruise object.
updatePassword(String, String) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Updates the password of an administrator by calling the updatePassword method of the AdministratorDAO implementation with the provided administrator name and new password and returns the result.
updatePassword(String, String) - Method in interface model.AdministratorDAO
Updates the password of an administrator by calling the updatePassword method with the provided administrator name and new password and returns the result.
updatePassword(String, String) - Method in class model.DBImplementationAdministrator
This method updates an administrator's password in the database based on the administrator's name.
updateWorker(Worker) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Updates the details of an existing worker.
updateWorker(Worker) - Method in class model.DBImplementationWorker
 
updateWorker(Worker) - Method in interface model.WorkerDAO
This method updates the information of a worker in the database based on their unique identifier (id).
